texto: I bought the wrong face soap. Why? Because it says smooth face cleanser on it. I put it on my face and I'm fairly certain it's lotion. I also bought something that says "Body soufflé." What is that? Is it a lotion? Is it shower gel? Am I supposed to eat it?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Heather Jonasson que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “I bought the wrong face soap. Why? Because it says smooth face cleanser on it. I put it on my fac…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, sweden, texas, com foco em viagem e sweden.
